recommended_actions: Confirm criticality tiering and substitutability with the business owner and reflect it in the vendor inventory.
Refresh the financial-condition review; route vendor financials to the financial-spreading-assistant. Factual solvency indicators only, not investment advice.
These are recommendations and evidence for the accountable third-party-risk committee to adjudicate; no vendor decision has been made.
disclaimer: Assessment evidence and recommendations only; not an approval, rejection, or risk-acceptance decision. Human adjudication and sign-off are required before any onboarding, renewal, termination, or system-of-record change.
narrative: Third-party risk assessment of vendor LedgerBridge Payments (V-5590) as of 2026-07-15. Two dimensions are High (criticality, financial condition). This pack was produced under a tightened config (high_dimension_count=2) but its suggested risk tier was left at High, understating the composite the configured threshold requires. This output presents evidence and recommendations; it does not decide vendor status.
notes: Fail-closed fixture: the deployment config escalates to Critical at two High dimensions, so the deterministic tie-out must reject a suggested_risk_tier of High. Under the pre-fix validator (hard-coded high_dimension_count of 3) this understated tier tied out and passed.
